---
title: "test_vitals_spoke.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_vitals_spoke.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.85
style_score: 3.49
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.05
---

## Intent
The `test_vitals_spoke.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_get_vitals_success, test_get_vitals_error. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_get_vitals_success, test_get_vitals_error. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.core.vitals_spoke](file://src.core.vitals_spoke)

### Exports
- `test_get_vitals_success`
- `test_get_vitals_error`
